mapper.select:
select * from `admin`
username like concat(`%`, #{username}, `%`)
order by id desc

select * from `admin`
username like concat('%', #{username}, '%') and email like concat('%', #{email}, '%')
and id in
#{id}
order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into `admin` (email, username, password, phone, role, avatar, surname) values(#{email},#{username},#{password},#{phone},#{role},#{avatar},#{surname})
mapper.update: update `admin` set email=#{email}, username = #{username}, password = #{password}, phone = #{phone}, role = #{role}, avatar = #{avatar}, surname = #{surname} where id = #{id}
